data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system implements these rules as described in the use case. The linked use case mentions that the system warns the organizer and releases unpaid seats unless overridden, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality in action, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing the implementation of auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-cancel/release functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats.
